must_detect.matched_text:
Status: This constitutes inside information under UK MAR; non‑public pending permitted delay; distribution restricted to Board and PDMRs only.
Summary: outage on “Hawthorn” payments platform from 03:14–08:52 BST due to third‑party patch regression; ~12,4OO card authorisations queued; no evidence of data exfiltration.
Immediate impact: potential H1 fee income deferral of 0.6–0.8% if backlog not cleared by month‑end; consistent with guidance in our 30 April RNS‑B trading update (RNSB/26/0099).
Public status: Not yet disclosed via R N S‑B; a generic holding line was posted to h t t p s : / / status . bramblegate‑finance . example (non‑price‑sensitive service notice).
Delay to disclosure: We rely on UK MAR Art. 17(4); confidentiality preserved, omission not likely to mislead, and we can ensure control; pre‑notified the competent authority via UK MOO portal, ref UKMOO/17/4/0‑0‑7.
Closed period: 30‑day blackout ahead of interim results under BSE‑UK rules; PDMRs reminded not to deal; wall‑crossing limited to two lenders under NDA on 0 6 / 0 6 / 2 0 2 6.
Selective disclosure risk: Ms. Priya Latchford (CFO) and Mr. Owen Kells (CISO) briefed three prospective ABS investors in a diligence call; each was wall‑crossed and acknowledged receipt of inside information.
Public reference: Our 2025 Sustainability & Controls Report (RNS‑B notice RNSB/25/0142, 14 March 2026) outlines Hawthorn resilience targets at a high level and remains public.
Technical details: affected nodes uk‑haw‑1a/1b; patch v9.8.1; hash ff:3a:4b:0l (ell); case ref INC‑2O26‑0l9B; auth queue ID 7X‑4l3‑UK; vendor ticket u r l https://support.vendor‑alpha.example/case?id=H4W‑981.
Customer data: only tokenised PANs observed; no unencrypted personal data; under UK GDPR we assess low risk to data subjects; notification to the UK DSO is not required at this time.
Market impact: preliminary P&L sensitivity <£1.2m deferred fees; this does not constitute a material adverse change under the 2024 RCF with Trillmere Lending Syndicate.
Remediation: rollback applied at 08:22; backlog clearing ETA 11:30; independent forensics engaged (Redmuir Cyber Ltd) with daily updates to the Audit & Risk Committee.
Disclosure plan: unless confidentiality is compromised, we intend to release a brief operational update via R N S‑B by 07:00 BST next trading day; broader comms to follow via investor microsite.
Governance: Audit & Risk Committee Chair Sir Rowan Hargate has convened an extraordinary meeting at 17:00; outcomes to be captured in the MAR Insider List (Bramblegate v2, list id bgf‑mar‑l1st).
Non‑issues: legacy onboarding project “silver fern” is unaffected; the travel policy email sent last week is routine; this note is not a profit warning nor a change to previously stated outlook.
